questions.question:

\(\begin{array}{|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Segment ID } & \text { Base } & \text { Limit } \\ \hline 0 & 200 & 200 \\ \hline 1 & 5000 & 1210 \\ \hline 2 & 1527 & 498 \\ \hline 3 & 2500 & 50 \\ \hline \end{array}\)
What happens if the logical address requested is - Segment Id 2 and offset 1000?

(ISRO CSE 2014)
options:
A.

Fetches the entry at the physical address 2527 for segment Id 2

D.

Fetches the entry at offset 27 in Segment Id 3

questions.question:

Assume the arm is located at the 100th track and moving towards track 200. If sequence of disc access is 126, 167, 199, 12, 36, 42, 51, 69 and 76 then which disc access scheduling policy is used?

questions.question:
Which of the following strategy is employed for overcoming the priority inversion problem?

(ISRO CSE 2013)
options:
A.

Temporarily raise the priority of lower priority level process

D.

Allow lower priority process to complete its job.
questions.correct_answer:
A.

Temporarily raise the priority of lower priority level process

questions.question:
